Text: At its meeting on 28 April 2021, the Committee, having been informed that the expulsion order against the complainant had become statute-barred on 20 April 2020 and that he could submit a new application for asylum in Sweden, decided to discontinue the examination of communication No. 919/2019, on the understanding that the complainant would be entitled to submit a new communication to the Committee should he face a renewed risk of forcible removal from the State party’s territory.
